narrative:
Cross Creek Twp township has 5,761 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.0 percentage points.
